common.welcome: Welcome to our Next.js MUI site
common.description: A modern, responsive website built with Next.js and Material UI.
common.name: Name
common.dual_star_making_desc_1: 制作电影、电视剧、纪录片等影视作品，涵盖选题、剧本创作、筹资、预算管理、拍摄、后期制作及宣传推广等全流程
common.dual_ip_incubation_desc_1: 业务涵盖音乐剧、舞蹈表演、戏剧演出等主要演艺类型，深度参与剧目策划、演员选角、编排排练、舞美设计及灯光音效设置等关键环节，构建完整的内容创制与制作能力。
common.dual_audience_to_builder_desc_1: 康养旅游与学习深度融合，采用体验式教育方式，为学生及旅游群体设计包含户外活动、文化研习、身心康养等内容的综合行程，实现旅有所学、学有所养、养有所获。
common.dual_rights_dividend_desc_1: 深度布局文化艺术、设计、传媒及数字内容四大领域，提供包括创意产品设计、文化艺术展览策划、创意活动运营以及知识产权商业化运营在内的全链条专业服务，致力于推动创意价值的多维转化。
common.dual_ai_star_gamefi_desc_1: 艺人经纪是敦华的创始业务。多年来，我们与众多一线明星艺人建立了深厚的友谊与长期战略合作，提供专业化的艺人经纪服务，涵盖艺人包装、推广宣传、商业演出安排、合约管理等全方位支持。
common.dual_cultural_commerce_desc_1: 敦华投资运营文旅康养小镇、饮用水品牌等实业项目，以行业发展先行者为定位，打造多元化文化产业布局。我们聚焦具有长期发展潜力的实体项目，追求可持续的投资回报。

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.subtitle: Built for faster replies and clearer communication across brand collaboration, procurement planning, and market execution.

contact.intro: For partnerships, sourcing inquiries, or channel expansion, reach out directly to the Dunhua business team and we will respond with tailored support.
contact.address: Shop I, No. 5 Shek Pai Tau Road, Tuen Mun, Hong Kong

methods.title: Choose the best way to reach us
methods.description: Whether you prefer email, phone, instant messaging, or social media, we have a direct channel ready for you.

email.title: Business Email
email.description: Best for partnership decks, quotation requests, and formal business communication.

phone.title: Phone Call
phone.description: Best for quick confirmations, follow-ups, and urgent coordination.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Best for real-time cross-region messaging and faster project alignment.

x.title: X / Twitter
x.description: Stay connected on social and reach out while following the latest brand updates.

details.title: Business details
details.description: If you need complete company contact details, you can also reach us through the channels below.

cta.title: Need a faster first reply?
cta.description: Start with WhatsApp or X for a quicker first touchpoint with our team.
